summary: [APU Health Monitor] Create query for APU Health Monitor in Engine Folder

output_fields.name: psn
output_fields.description: Unique PSN associated with each APU Serial Number

output_fields.name: ref_date
output_fields.description: Reference Date (latest date only for each APU)

output_fields.name: value
output_fields.description: CT5ATP value representing APU health metric

transformations: Join rotables table with rotables_trend table on psn field
Join result with aircraft table on ac_registr field to obtain ac_typ
Filter rotables_trend to include only the latest ref_date for each unique PSN
Ensure trend_type equals CT5 for all records
acceptance_criteria: Query returns all APUs of type B737NG with their latest CT5ATP health metrics
Only the most recent reference date is included for each APU
All required fields (partno, serialno, psn, ac_registr, ref_date, trend_type, event_perfno_i, value, ac_typ) are present in output
Query executes against AMOS Acceptance environment initially, with capability to switch to AMOS Production upon go-live
VDS is created in Engine Folder as specified
Workorder information is included when present, null when absent
